name: Kalani Patel
bio: Grew up on the Big Island and learned the art of coffee roasting from local farmers. Bringing authentic Hawaiian coffee culture to the Bay Area.

name: Mia Chen
bio: Trained in Paris and Tokyo, specializing in French-Asian fusion pastries. Creates our signature crêpes and seasonal treats.

name: David Santos
bio: 15 years in hospitality management. Passionate about creating welcoming spaces and building strong community connections.

name: Leilani Wong
bio: Certified Q Grader and coffee competition judge. Loves teaching customers about the journey from bean to cup.
